1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values in utlosningomr

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons with the chosen high risk class

5.description: find parcels that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: select quick-clay hazard polygons filtered to the high risk identifier

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

6.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

1.description: get kommunenummer and municipality geometry for Trondheim

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in utlosningomr

4.description: select utlosningomr polygons filtered by the chosen high-risk class

5.description: reduce kvikkleire high-risk polygons to Trondheim extent

6.description: get teig parcels in Trondheim municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

7.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced kvikkleire high-risk polygons

8.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teigid

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
